stories.original_headline: A lost moon may have created Titan and Saturn’s rings
stories.original_summary: Saturn’s largest moon, Titan, may have been born in a colossal cosmic crash. New research suggests Titan formed when two older moons slammed together hundreds of millions of years ago—an event so violent it reshaped Saturn’s entire moon system and may have indirectly sparked the formation of its ico
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Celestial Crash Formed Titan and Saturn's Rings!
stories.fantasy_story: Elderly Wizards of the Stargazer's Tower have deciphered an ancient celestial mystery. They believe the great moon Titan was born from a tremendous clash of two smaller sky-orbs. This violent event reshaped the very heavens around the great planet Saturn, even creating its famous shimmering rings.

stories.original_headline: James Webb reveals a barred spiral galaxy shockingly early in the Universe
stories.original_summary: Astronomers have spotted what may be one of the universe’s earliest barred spiral galaxies — a striking cosmic structure forming just 2 billion years after the Big Bang. The galaxy, COSMOS-74706, dates back about 11.5 billion years and contains a stellar bar, a bright, linear band of stars and gas s
stories.fantasy_headline: Great Eye Reveals Ancient Spiral Realm in the Distant Cosmos!
stories.fantasy_story: The Celestial Sages, gazing through the Great Eye of the Arcane Observatory, have witnessed a wondrous sight. An ancient spiral realm, called COSMOS-74706, has been found far back in the dawn of the Cosmos. It spun into being just after the Great Creation, bearing a luminous bar of countless stars and stardust.

stories.original_headline: The best instant cameras you can buy right now
stories.original_summary: Even with the ability to take excellent photos with our phones and instantly share them across the world, there’s something magical about the old-school instant camera. stories.fantasy_headline: Discover the Finest Moment-Capture Devices from Artisan Guilds!
stories.fantasy_story: Even with wondrous scrying mirrors that share images instantly, folks still cherish the ancient moment-capture devices. With a mere click, these enchanted lenses forge a memory-print right before your eyes. The Artisans' Guilds offer various excellent devices, creating tangible scrolls of captured time.
